overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in a game engine environment, walking along a dark hillside trail at night that descends to a beach where a large wooden sailing ship is beached. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with glowing green lights visible in the distance against a starry sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a grassy hillside at night. The path is flanked by sloping terrain and occasional rocky outcrops, with limited sky visibility due to the enclosed nature of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shoreline approach with beached sailing ship

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up to reveal a wide coastal scene with a large wooden sailing ship beached on the shore. Glowing green lights float in the air ahead as the camera descends toward the beach, transitioning from enclosed hillside to open shoreline.

segments.scene_description: Walking across the open sandy beach toward the beached wooden ship, with the vessel now clearly visible in the mid-ground. The terrain is flat and open, with forested cliffs visible in the distant background and dark water along the right side.

events.description: camera begins circling around the ship to view it from multiple angles

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the large beached wooden ship, examining its hull, mast, and structure from close range. The ship dominates the foreground as the camera moves around it on the sandy beach, with the dark night sky and distant hills visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined hillside trail down to an expansive beach dominated by a massive shipwreck. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt path through a grassy hillside at night, where the view is restricted by sloping terrain and rocky outcrops. As the trail opens up, the camera descends from the enclosed hillside toward a wide coastal scene, revealing glowing green lights floating in the air above the shoreline. The scene then expands across the flat, sandy beach with dark water to the right and forested cliffs in the distance before turning toward the beached wooden ship. Finally, the camera approaches and circles the vessel, moving close to the hull and masts as the ship comes to dominate the foreground against the dark night sky.
